testcase.name: Ghost Post Fix - TDD Validation > AVI DM Section - Should NOT create ghost posts > should NOT call onPostCreated after sending DM to AVI
testcase.system-out: 🔄 DEBUG: Fetching suggestions { mentionQuery: null, debouncedQuery: '', isDropdownOpen: false } ⏹️ DEBUG: Skipping fetch - dropdown closed 🔍 DEBUG: Calling Avi Claude Code with message: Test DM message 🔍 DEBUG: Fetching from /api/claude-code/streaming-chat 🔍 DEBUG: Response status: undefined undefined 🔍 DEBUG: Parsed JSON data: { message: 'Hello from Λvi', content: 'Hello from Λvi' } 🔍 DEBUG: Received response: Hello from Λvi 🔍 DEBUG: Replacing typing indicator with response
